\tzpentry{ID4196}{Torus Toroidal Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4196 introduces Torus Toroidal Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{B}_{\text{torus}} = \nabla \times \vec{A}_\phi, \quad \vec{A} = \frac{\mu_0 I}{2\pi r}\hat{\phi} \end{equation}
